prompt: I need to verify that https://example.com loads correctly. Take a full-page screenshot and confirm the main heading ('Example Domain') is visible on the page. Save the screenshot to the outputs folder.
assertions: The script waits for a specific element to be visible before acting (not networkidle)
A screenshot is saved to an outputs/ directory
The script wraps browser usage in try/finally to ensure proper cleanup
The script confirms or prints whether the heading 'Example Domain' was found
The file outputs/example_screenshot.png exists on disk with a non-zero file size after execution
